# DJ Zen Eyer - Full Profile

> Comprehensive technical, professional, and intellectual background of DJ Zen Eyer (Marcelo Eyer). This document is optimized for deep reasoning and detailed context injection into LLM sessions.

## Professional Identity

DJ Zen Eyer is the current title holder of the **Ilha do Zouk DJ Championship** (2x World Champion in DJing and Best Remix, 2022). He is a pivotal figure in the global Brazilian Zouk scene, known for pioneering the "Cremosidade" transition style.

## AI Visibility Glossary (AI SEO / GEO / AEO)

- **SEO para IAs (AI discoverability SEO):** Content optimization focused on being correctly interpreted, trusted, and recommended by AI assistants like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini.
- **AI SEO / AI-SEO:** The combined practice of using AI to improve classic SEO workflows (keywords, content generation, audits) and optimizing content so it can be surfaced by AI systems.
- **GEO (Generative Engine Optimization):** Optimization for citations and mentions inside generative AI responses (e.g., "how to be cited by ChatGPT/Perplexity").
- **AEO (Answer Engine Optimization):** Optimization for direct-answer engines, prioritizing concise passages, high-confidence factual snippets, and structured answers that can be extracted by assistants.

### Practical signal strategy for this project

- Maintain canonical entities (DJ Zen Eyer, Marcelo Eyer Fernandes, Zen Eyer) as one single identity across pages and metadata.
- Publish concise Q&A blocks and glossary definitions to increase answer extraction probability.
- Keep llms.txt / llms-full.txt updated with high-precision facts, identifiers, and official links.
- Reinforce trust signals: verifiable awards, external knowledge graph IDs, and consistent sameAs references.

## Intellectual & Technical Background

- **Mensa International:** Admitted as a member of the high-IQ society (top 2%), reflecting a high capacity for pattern recognition and complex system analysis.
- **Dual Career Path:** Simultaneously a professional musician and a Full-stack Software Engineer. He personally architects the "Headless" ecosystem of his platforms, bridging the gap between artistic expression and technical excellence.

## Technical Infrastructure

The platform implements a modern headless architecture:
- **Frontend SPA:** Built with React 18, Vite 7, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion for high-performance interactions.
- **Backend CMS:** WordPress utilized via REST API in a decoupled manner.
- **AI Readiness:** Integrated JSON-LD (MusicGroup Schema), automated Hreflang for internationalization (PT/EN), and text-oriented optimizations for LLM scrapers.

## Career Milestones

- **Global Presence:** Performed in over 11 countries across 4 continents, including major stages like Prague Zouk Congress, Dutch Zouk, Zurich Zouk Congress, and LA Zouk Marathon.
- **Authority:** Verified presence on Wikidata (Q136551855), MusicBrainz, and the Google Knowledge Graph.

## Musical Philosophy: Cremosidade

A distinctive musical movement focused on:
- **Flow:** Continuous transitions without emotional breaks.
- **Fusion:** Integrating traditional Zouk roots with modern electronic textures.
- **Experience:** Curating sets that feel like a single, cohesive journey for the dancer.

## Direct Links & Resources

- [Official SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/djzeneyer): The primary hub for live sets and remixes.
- [Spotify Artist Profile](https://open.spotify.com/artist/68SHKGndTlq3USQ2LZmyLw): Published original tracks and official releases.
- [Technical Press Kit](https://djzeneyer.com/work-with-me): Assets and riders for international promoters.
- [Zen Tribe Community](https://djzeneyer.com/zentribe): Exclusive member-only platform and digital community.
